title: [track-defect-density] Aggregate failure: track defect density (0/18 scenario checks failed) on n/a — aggregate finding across endpoints — expected All 18 'track defect density' scenario checks pass against the documented behaviour, observed [api-tester-track-defect-density] quality outcome=FAIL; metric=0.0 (undocumented)
expected: All 18 'track defect density' scenario checks pass against the documented behaviour

testing_steps: 1. Start the target API at http://localhost:8899.
2. Write a script that parses TestCases/*/cases.json, counts Fail cases per endpoint family, and divides by that family's total cases to compute defect density.
3. Assert the computed densities match this run's recorded values; families with non-zero density are the defect clusters.
4. Compare your script's failures with the per-scenario evidence in TestCases/track-defect-density/cases.json — this run recorded 0 of 18 checks failing.
